## Checklist

- [ ] Resource is publicly accessible and actively maintained
- [ ] Frontmatter follows the Zod schema (see `src/content/config.ts`)
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] No conflict of interest with this resource (or disclosed below)
